item.title: Today’s Contexto: Hints & Answer For April 14, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Contexto is a word association game that gives you a new word to guess every single day. With every attempt, the AI algorithm determines how close your guess is to the daily answer based on thematic and contextual similarity.

Sometimes, though, no matter how experienced you are, the word you’re looking for can be incredibly vague and hard to deduce. Luckily for you, this guide is full of hints to give you a helping hand, but make sure you give today’s Contexto a go if you haven’t already!

How To Play Contexto

Contexto is incredibly simple to play, but difficult to master. All you have to do is type words into the search bar, and the AI algorithm will tell you how close your word is to the answer.

You’ll know how close your guess is based on the colour of the bar and the number next to it.

  • Red includes guesses with the number 1,501 and above, meaning you’re way off from the secret word.
  • Orange includes guesses between 301 and 1,500, meaning you’re getting closer, but still some ways off.
  • Green includes guesses between 1 and 300, meaning you’re on the right track.

Best Contexto Tips & Tricks

  • Start off using broad terms, then narrow down once you’ve got under the 1,000 mark.
  • Try using Nouns first, and dip into verbs or adjectives once you’ve discovered the context.
  • Experiment with random words at times, especially as different forms of a root word can rank differently, such as work and worker.
  • Guess away, as unlike other word games like Wordle, you aren’t limited to a strict number of attempts.

Best Starting Words For Contexto

Here are some great starting words to get you going with Contexto:

  • Thing
  • Person
  • Place
  • Animal
  • Work
  • Nature
  • Game
  • Concept
  • Idea
  • Food

Contexto Hints For Today, April 14, 2026

Without giving away today’s Contexto answer, here are a few helpful hints to get you thinking in the right direction:

  • Hint 1: Job
  • Hint 2: Requires an expertise in a subject
  • Hint 3: Typically involves research and experimentation

If they don’t help, then here are the nine closest words, going from tenth to second:

  • Biology
  • Laboratory
  • Professor
  • Research
  • Biologist
  • Scientific
  • Physicist
  • Science
  • Researcher

Today’s Contexto Answer For April 14, 2026

If you’ve tried everything and still can’t figure out today’s Contexto answer, then you can find it down below:

Answer: Scientist

A Scientist is an expert who studies or works in one of the sciences.

When Is The Next Contexto Game?

Contexto is updated daily at 12 AM or Midnight in your respective time zone, meaning the next game will start on April 15.

The Contexto schedule is very consistent, with a new game releasing at the same time every day.

How did you find today’s Contexto? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more word game guides, check out the following:

  • Wordle

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

MOBILE APP

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: NYT Strands #772 Hints and Answers for Today, April 14, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Strands is a daily word search puzzle game from The New York Times. It is a relatively new game, launched in 2024, in which players seek a common theme among words in a 6×8 letter grid.

Whether it’s your first time playing or you’re a Strands veteran, today’s tips and strategies can help you find words faster. So, if you’ve found yourself stuck with today’s Strands, don’t worry, below you’ll find some helpful hints and even the answers for Strands Game #772 for Tuesday, April 14, 2026

To play today’s Strands, head to the game’s website.

IMPORTANT: The following information includes spoilers on today’s edition of Strands. If you don’t want the answer given to you, stop scrolling.

How To Play Strands

Strands is a daily word search that challenges you to find words with a common theme. There’s also a Spanagram that reveals the deeper theme behind the words.

  • Words that are three letters and under do not count.
  • Words that reveal the correct theme appear in blue.
  • The Spanagram turns yellow when found.
  • Finding three words that don’t fit the theme will reveal a hint to help you find the proper words.

The goal is to string together as many words as possible. Every letter on the grid gets used! Daily puzzles keep players coming back for more, making it a fun brain exercise and a popular online trend.

Strands can only be played on the New York Times website or on the NYT Games app.

Strands Hints For Today, April 14, 2026

The Strands’ answers to the theme of Game #772 are all related to terms you use to describe things not in focus.

General Strands Hints For April 14

Without giving today’s Strands answers completely away, here are a few helpful hints for today to get you started:

  • Hint 1: soulDecision’s one major pop hit in 2000.
  • Hint 2: Opposite of hard.
  • Hint 3: There’s a chance of meatballs in the sky today.

Use these clues to narrow down your searches and increase your chances of solving Strands #772 for April 14, 2026.

Words to Help You Find Strand Hints for April 14, 2026

If you want help getting started without having today’s Strands answer given to you, there are a few starter words worth trying that will help you unlock some in-game hints. A few starter words that may help are:

  • FADE
  • BLUR
  • DOLE
  • CLOUD
  • BEDS

Today’s Strands Answer For Game #772 On April 14, 2026

If you’ve tried everything, including using the above hints, and are still stuck, you can find the answers to today’s Strands below. Check out the answers for past puzzles here.

  • CLOUDY
  • MUTED
  • HAZY
  • BLURRY
  • FADED
  • SOFT
  • BEDIMMED
  • SPANAGRAM: OUTOFFOCUS

If you solved today’s Strands without our answers, congratulations! If not, take note of the best tips above for tomorrow’s puzzle, and check back daily for more hints.

When Is The Next Strands Game After #772?

All New York Times games are updated daily at 12 am or Midnight in your respective time zone. Information about the next game is often available in the hours leading up to it, giving players a heads-up. The game on April 15 will be Strands Game #773.

What Is Strands?

Strands is a daily word search puzzle game created by The New York Times. Launched in 2024, Strands challenges players to discover a common theme among words in a 6×8 letter grid. The game’s original concept was developed by Juliette Seive, a research director on The New York Times Games team, with the aim of replicating Wordle’s success. Tracy Bennett serves as the puzzle editor for Strands, overseeing the creation and curation of daily puzzles since its launch.

For even more Insider Gaming delivered straight to your inbox, sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Someone Spent $1 Million in One Hit on GTA 5 Shark Cards
item.content:encoded:
Rockstar Games is reeling from a recent breach that has led to scores of data being published online, mostly concerning Grand Theft Auto Online and Red Dead Online. The information, which was dropped online today after Rockstar Games seemingly refused to pay a ‘ransom’, has unveiled some telling financial data about Grand Theft Auto’s multiplayer portion.

One of the most tantalizing (or perhaps bizarre) tidbits was the revelation that, in a single transaction, someone spent $1 million on Shark Cards in GTA Online.

One. Million. Dollars.

But It Gets Even More Astounding

If you were to hear that someone spent $1 million on GTA Online Shark Cards in a single transaction, you might be shocked. But that number starts to pale in comparison to all the other gargantuan purchases uncovered in the recent Rockstar Games leak.

In a post on social media, user vx-underground, who is best known for posts relating to data breaches and leaks in the tech space, revealed key figures relating to Shark Cards, the online digital currency used in GTA 5’s multiplayer platform.

Not only did it reveal that GTA Shark Cards made a whopping $5 billion in ten years, but it also confirmed that, in 2020, a single transaction for Shark Cards was worth $1,030.926.

Beyond that, things get wild.

The next biggest transaction, made in 2017 in North America, was worth $984,000. Behind that, $953,000.

The trend continues downwards, but the data provided by vx-underground is still showing lines of transactions over half a million dollars when you reach a few dozen listings. Over the years, some users have spent more on Shark Cards than most will see in their lives.

Fans were debating whether the data provided indicated a single transaction or a day’s worth of transactions all added up. Given that there were multiple lines associated with the same platform on the same days, and not a general grouping of every transaction, it stands to reason that they were unique purchases.

It’s worth noting that almost every transaction that topped the charts did so on Christmas Day.

What’s the most you’ve ever spent on GTA Online Shark Cards? Let us know on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out what Nikita’s new game means for Escape from Tarkov

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

MOBILE APP

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Metro 2039 Story Leaks Ahead of Xbox First Look Reveal
item.content:encoded:
New details regarding Metro 2039 have emerged.

Metro 2039 is the fourth mainline title in the Metro series, and it is due to be revealed on April 16 in an Xbox First Look showcase. However, story details have emerged for the upcoming title, which was rumored to be following the storyline of the Metro 2034 book.

Details on Metro 2039’s Storyline

Courtesy of IGDB, a new synopsis for the game has been leaked. And what promises to be “the most shocking” title in the series yet, the synopsis teases a powerful campaign that weaves exploration, survival, combat, and stealth together.

The full synopsis can be seen below:

METRO 2039 is the next landmark FPS from acclaimed storytellers, 4A Games. Journey into the dark heart of post-apocalyptic Moscow in a harrowing conflict for the very soul of the Metro.

The year is 2039. For a quarter century, the last survivors of nuclear war have been locked in bitter conflict deep in the Metro tunnels beneath the poisoned city of Moscow. Now, finally, they have been united by a single leader, a fanatical Spartan known as Hunter.

But this is no peace: Hunter’s Novoreich regime rules through propaganda and fear, subjugating the population in the name of a new war for the surface against a dark and terrifying enemy.

In the wilderness beyond the city, the reclusive Stranger is haunted by violent waking nightmares. When the ghosts of his past force him out of exile, he must undertake a harrowing journey into the shattered ruins of Moscow, to the one place he swore he’d never go. The Metro.

Experience the most shocking METRO adventure yet in a powerful single-player story that weaves exploration, survival, combat, and stealth across a hauntingly beautiful but deadly world with unparalleled immersion.

Inspired by the worldwide best-selling METRO book trilogy by Dmitry Glukhovsky.

Insider Gaming will have full coverage of the event on April 16. Learn more about the upcoming showcase here.

Are you excited for Metro 2039? Sound off in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP
